text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
On the way home from an outing with Mejiro
Dober, we notice a big commotion in front of the
shopping mall.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Is that... Air Groove?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
It's such an honor to shake your hand! Thank you
so much!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
I watched your last race from the front row! You
really live up to your name as the Empress!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Thank you. It's so encouraging to have your
support. I'll do my best to continue meeting your
expectations.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: Y-you're amazing! May I shake your hand too?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hi, Air Groove. That was an impressive number of
fans.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I'm just grateful for their recognition. It motivates
me to keep reaching for greater heights in order
to repay all their support.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You really are amazing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I would never be able to act that confidently in
front of fans.
choice_data_list: There's no need to be so harsh on yourself.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
You can't blame yourself for that. Besides, I too
understand how nerve-racking it is to be in front
of a crowd.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
But you mustn't lose yourself. The most important
thing is what you want to do, and nothing else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: What I want to do?

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text:
Oh! It's Mejiro Dober! You're just as wonderful in
person!

text_block_list.name: Fan E
text_block_list.text:
I've heard so much about you recently! You've
turned me into a real fan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Wait, are they talking about me?! And not Air
Groove?!
choice_data_list: You're a star in your own right.
You're a star in your own right.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Sh-shut up! You're seriously messing with my
head!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No, not you too, Trainer! I-I don't have any idea
what's going on anymore...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How does it feel to have your hard work
recognized and receive their support, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
How does it feel to have your hard work
recognized and receive their support, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Well... It makes me happy, and I do want to thank
them for their encouragement...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I'm not like you, Air Groove...
choice_data_list: Just thank them however you can right now.
Just thank them however you can right now.
I'll support you with all my might!
I'll support you with all my might!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I'm not like you, Air Groove...
choice_data_list: Just thank them however you can right now.
Just thank them however you can right now.
I'll support you with all my might!
I'll support you with all my might!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But...
choice_data_list:
You don't have to strive for perfection
immediately.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Exactly. All they want from you are some sincere
words.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer... Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As long as you take it one step at a time, you'll
move closer to not only me... but also the racer
you want to become.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'll do it. I'll do my best to better myself!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: U-um! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Y-you're the last person I need support from...
choice_data_list: Just try taking another step forward.

You want to be able to hold your head high in
front of your dad, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I appreciate your support, but...
choice_data_list: Just try taking another step forward.

You want to be able to hold your head high in
front of your dad, right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Another step...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ah...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Hmph. I was going to even without you bossing
me around.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah, you're right. This is my chance to grow. I
don't want to have any regrets.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm rooting for you too, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: I'm rooting for you too, Dober.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
As long as you take it one step at a time, you'll
move closer to not only me... but also the racer
you want to become.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: U-um! Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I still have a long way to go compared to other
racers...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to do my best! And, um...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for all your support! It means so much
to me!

text_block_list.name: Fan E
text_block_list.text: Th-thank you too! We're cheering for you!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Heh. You didn't even have anything to worry
about.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...If you say so.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: W-was it? ...Thank you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I'm changing slowly but surely... I just know it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite her icy response to my encouragement,
Mejiro Dober can't completely hide how pleased
she is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As she thanks me, Mejiro Dober's expression
brightens like a ray of light peeking out from the
clouds.
